system: GitHub Copilot CLI Co-work Session Configuration

enforcement.description: All operations route through approved agents defined in rules.json

execution_planning.description: Execution planning documents guide orchestrator and agent behavior

multi_agent_orchestration.description: Orchestrator agent delegates to developer agents based on execution plan

workflow.phase_1_planning: Orchestrator analyzes execution plan and GitHub issues
workflow.phase_2_delegation: Orchestrator creates branches and delegates to agents
workflow.phase_3_implementation: Developer agents implement per execution plan
workflow.phase_5_merge: GitHub Actions merges PRs using gh CLI --merge

agent_git_workflow.description: Delegated agents follow strict git workflow before any operation

step_4_file_tracking.method: git status, git diff per commit
step_4_file_tracking.feature_branch_requirement: All changes on feature branch only

examples: fix(#40): Fix keyboard navigation in modal
refactor(#32): Optimize N+1 query with DataLoader

gh_cli_integration.description: Use GitHub gh CLI for all GitHub operations

merge_strategy.description: Use --merge flag to keep commit history

github_actions_automation.description: GitHub Actions automates PR merge to main
github_actions_automation.trigger: When PR is reviewed and approved

workflow.step_1: Developer opens PR from feature branch

pr_consolidation.description: Reviewer creates consolidation branch to review multiple PRs together
pr_consolidation.when_used: Multiple independent PRs need integrated testing

workflow.step_2_merge: Merge all feature branches into consolidation
workflow.step_3_test: Run full test suite on consolidated changes
workflow.step_4_verify: Verify no conflicts and all acceptance criteria met
workflow.step_5_review: Review consolidated changes for cross-PR issues
workflow.step_6_approve: Approve or request changes on individual PRs

parallel_execution.description: Support multi-agent parallel execution using git worktree
when_to_use: Execution plan indicates multiple agent delegation

copilot_cli_implementation_mode.description: Practical GitHub Copilot CLI with @orchestrator reading execution plans and delegating agents sequentially
advantages: Full context preservation across agent switches
No manual copy-paste of execution plans
Clean audit trail in single conversation
Execution plan becomes shared context for all agents

phase_1_orchestrator_invocation.user_prompt: @orchestrator read docs/implementation-planning/[PLAN].md and delegate appropriate agents per execution plan
phase_1_orchestrator_invocation.orchestrator_role: Read plan, analyze tasks, make intelligent delegation decisions

phase_2_delegation.orchestrator_decides: Based on plan analysis, which agent to invoke

delegation_triggers.to_developer: Issues requiring code implementation (features, bug fixes)

phase_3_sequential_execution.pattern: @developer works on issue #1 → issue #2 → ... per plan

phase_4_consolidation.task: Consolidate multiple PRs, verify integration per execution plan

phase_5_automation.task: Auto-merge approved PRs using gh CLI --merge

key_features: Implicit delegation (user doesn't specify agent, @orchestrator decides)
File reference triggers plan reading (user mentions @docs/path/to/plan.md)
Sequential agent execution in single terminal
Execution plan becomes shared, persistent context

orchestrator.read_plan_and_delegate: Read execution plan and delegate to appropriate agents
orchestrator.example: @orchestrator read docs/implementation-planning/[PLAN].md and delegate agents per plan
orchestrator.implicit_delegation: Orchestrator decides which agent based on plan analysis
orchestrator./plan: Create execution plan for multi-agent delegation

developer.example: @developer implement issue #35 per execution plan; git create/switch/implement/add/commit/push/PR

reviewer.consolidate_prs: Consolidate multiple PRs and verify integration
reviewer.example: @reviewer consolidate Phase 4 PRs per execution plan; create consolidation branch, merge, test, review

tester.run_tests: Run test suite per execution plan
tester.example: @tester run integration tests per Phase 4 plan

metadata.purpose: GitHub Copilot CLI co-work session with execution plans and multi-agent delegation
metadata.target_audience: Development teams using GitHub Copilot CLI
